## Type of Change

- [ ] 📝 New paper(s) added
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (broken links, wrong categories, typos)
- [ ] 📊 New benchmark results
- [ ] 🛠️ New resource (code, blog post, reading guide)

## Checklist

- [ ] The paper has an explicit on-policy sampling component (student generates rollouts)
- [ ] Entry follows the existing table format with 📐 model annotation
- [ ] Category section number matches the paper's primary contribution
- [ ] Links are correct and accessible
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if adding papers)
